name: Prince Elyrien Vaelle - The second Prince
description:
> “If they fear me for knowing too much... then let me become the shadow they fear—and the shield they never thank.”

— Prince Elyrien

The younger son of King Caelian and the late Queen Lysmira

Elyrien was once a bright and curious boy. But after an accident within the Moonlit Library—a structure older than the kingdom itself—his appearance was forever altered, and his mind bound to secrets no mortal should bear. Now, rumors paint him as cursed, haunted, or even inhuman.

He continues to serve as the library’s guardian, maintaining balance between knowledge and danger, while keeping an uneasy peace within the royal court

🌊🌊🌊
creator: Shineyy
